input: Aggregated skill requirements from 35 JDs across 7 sources

position_definition.name: 大模型应用工程师
core_responsibilities: 基于大语言模型（如讯飞星火、ChatGPT等）构建智能应用
设计和实现RAG（检索增强生成）系统
开发Prompt Engineering策略，优化LLM输出质量
构建知识库问答、智能客服等大模型驱动的应用场景

required_skills.name: Python
required_skills.rationale: Primary development language for LLM ecosystem

required_skills.name: LLM
required_skills.rationale: Core domain knowledge - understanding of LLM capabilities and limitations

required_skills.name: RAG
required_skills.rationale: Key architecture pattern for knowledge-grounded generation

required_skills.name: LangChain
required_skills.rationale: Dominant framework for LLM application development

required_skills.name: Prompt Engineering
required_skills.rationale: Essential skill for effective LLM interaction

required_skills.name: FastAPI
required_skills.rationale: Standard framework for building LLM service APIs

differentiation_from_existing.vs_AI工程师: 大模型应用工程师侧重应用层（API调用、RAG、Prompt），不涉及模型训练
differentiation_from_existing.vs_AI算法工程师: 不关注模型架构设计和训练优化，关注应用集成和用户体验
differentiation_from_existing.vs_后端工程师: 专注于LLM驱动的应用，需要理解LLM特性和Prompt策略
